analysis.seasonal_notes: Google Trends indicates seasonality in MG Road searches. Declining trend from 12-month average suggests lower interest in off-season months. Rising queries for vehicle pricing (MG Hector, Cyberster) and specific venues (KAI, Radisson Blu) indicate seasonal spikes around festival seasons and new product launches. Recommend monitoring quarterly to identify peak seasons for content promotion and paid campaigns. Property searches typically peak in Q3-Q4 (post-monsoon, pre-year-end), so prioritize content launch in Q2 to capture this demand.
